notes: Single-session task-list scenario: user asks opencode to track three items with todowrite, updating each item's status as it goes. The agent runs a multi-step tool loop (step-finish reason=tool-calls + step-start per iteration), calling todowrite to update statuses. irrlicht observes the session state arc AND the todo-list contents — the items and their status surface in the session API's tasks field (asserted in the replay golden, which ends with one completed, one in_progress, one pending — exercising all three statuses). No child sessions are spawned; SubagentCount stays 0.

text: User prompt drives session ready → working (no delay bound — local-model turn-start latency is unbounded, per the opencode convention in session-reset/basic-turn)

invariants: no state_transition to ready for session
no state_transition to waiting for session
text: Session stays working across all todowrite calls — the multi-step tool loop (step-finish reason=tool-calls → step-start) keeps the session in working throughout
Final step-finish reason=stop transitions session working → ready; no child sessions were spawned (no delay bound — local-model turn duration is unbounded)
